answer: Supabase offers unlimited API access on all plans, including the Free tier [1][2]. The Free tier allows for two active projects, which are automatically paused after one week of inactivity [1][3][4]. You can access these services through a self-serve model by creating an account and starting a project on the platform without requiring a credit card [5][4]. All Supabase plans, including the Free tier, include a dedicated Postgres database, authentication, and API support [1][5].
